name: recorded: unicode fraction quantities survive the pipeline (cookies)

structured.title: Brown Butter Miso Cookies
directions: Brown the butter until nutty and amber, then cool 20 minutes.
Whisk flour and baking soda together.
Beat the cooled brown butter with both sugars and the miso for 2 minutes.
Add egg, yolk and vanilla, then mix in the dry ingredients.
Fold in the chocolate and chill the dough at least 1 hour.
Bake at 350F for 11 to 12 minutes and top with flaky salt while warm.
